items.headline: /usage now breaks down MCP call costs
items.body: claude code 2.1.149 adds per-category cost breakdown to /usage, splitting charges between skills, subagents, plugins, and MCP server calls. the ADO MCP Server has been running blind on cost — this is the first direct read on what each Azure DevOps tool invocation actually pulls from the subscription. worth running through a realistic sprint-planning session and treating the output as a baseline before adding new tools.
